vocabulary.description: The user uses an imprecise or borrowed term for the outcome.
vocabulary.default_real_ask: Replace vague terminology with a concrete capability and measurable outcome.

scope.description: The typed request understates the real scope or hides dependencies.
scope.default_real_ask: Clarify affected systems, success criteria, and minimum safe scope.

expertise.description: The user proposes a solution that may not fit the actual need.
expertise.default_real_ask: Focus on the outcome and choose the simplest viable approach.

emotional.description: The request contains frustration, fear, blame, or uncertainty that affects execution.
emotional.default_real_ask: Add safety mechanisms and separate emotional context from the work item.

context.description: The request assumes missing shared context or uses dangling references.
context.default_real_ask: Ask for the missing antecedent, audience, deadline, and deliverable.
